### Join our Discord!
**⚠️ Jones is still in Very EARLY development, check the changelog tab to see whats in the latest Update⚠️**
## What is Jones?
Jones enhances Minecraft’s textures with details inspired by official trailers while preserving the classic vanilla style.
### Made with ❤️ by Jagrav & Naman
